description: Create, document, build, and install a new R package named `statkit` at `/home/ga/RProjects/statkit`. The package must include two functions in `R/stats.R`: `std_error(x, na.rm = FALSE)`, which calculates the standard error of the mean (sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))), and `coef_var(x, na.rm = FALSE)`, which calculates the coefficient of variation as a percentage (sd(x)/mean(x) * 100). Ensure `na.rm` is handled correctly in both functions, specifically excluding NAs from the length calculation in `std_error` when `na.rm` is true. Include a sample dataset named `project_metrics` (a data frame with at least 3 columns and 10 rows) in the package's data directory. Provide full documentation for both functions and the dataset, including parameters, return values, and examples. The `DESCRIPTION` file must specify Title: 'Statistical Utility Kit', Version: '0.1.0', and Author: 'Ga Agent'. Build the package into a source tarball named `statkit_0.1.0.tar.gz` in `~/RProjects`, install it into the local R library, and create a verification script at `/home/ga/RProjects/verify_package.R` that loads the library and demonstrates the functions working.
